rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>哇哇哇！你是谁哩！？<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>Wh-whoa! Who are you?!<unk[5:0]> You know what?
I don't care!

If you're here, then I'm saved! <unk[5:0]>Ugh, I've
been stuck in here for ages!

<unk[3:0:257]>Did you...<unk[5:0]>find my message in a bottle and
come to rescue me?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>啊，太好了……<unk[5:0]>
还好我没有放弃这一丝希望哩！
<unk[3:0:259]>沃托里村现在变成了那样，<unk[5:0]>
一条鱼都进货不来……

逃到洞窟里又被困住了……
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>真可谓是诸事不顺，
但还好在最后的关头，<unk[5:0]>信息瓶救了我一命哩！
<unk[3:0:264]>如果这是我转运的兆头……<unk[5:0]>
那我今后的生意也会蒸蒸日上哩！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>這樣啊，太好了……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:259]>因為沃托里村變成那樣子了，<unk[5:0]>

但在最後一刻<unk[5:0]>訊息瓶總算是發揮作用哩！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>It really worked...<unk[5:0]> I knew it was a long
shot, but it was worth it!

<unk[3:0:259]>After what went down in Lurelin Village,<unk[5:0]>
I couldn't exactly refresh my stock of fish,
so I went out to try to catch my own.
That's when a storm kicked up. <unk[5:0]>I tried to
shelter in this cave, but got shut in.

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Yeah, things were pretty bad for a while,
but look at me now!<unk[5:0]> That bottle really
turned things around!
<unk[3:0:264]>If this lucky streak keeps up, it's gotta
bode well for business!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>Oh? <unk[5:0]>You didn't even see my message?<unk[5:0]>
No, of course you didn't...

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>I put my hopes and dreams into that little
bottle...<unk[5:0]>but I guess they're all sunk.

First there's the attack on Lurelin Village,<unk[5:0]>
which meant I couldn't restock my supply
of fish...
Then I go out to fish up my own, but the
only thing I catch is a storm. <unk[5:0]>So I go take
shelter in this cave, and BOOM, I'm stuck.
<unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Now you tell me that my letter—my ONE
shot at getting out of here—never found a
reader?<unk[5:0]> It's just one thing after another...
...<unk[5:1]>Huh.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>Wait, hold on.<unk[5:1]> The whole point of the
letter was to get someone to come help
me. You're someone... You can help me!
<unk[3:0:257]>Maybe my luck's finally turning around!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>Yeah! <unk[5:0]>Yeah, it has to be!<unk[5:0]> That's gotta
bode well for business.
